fields.label: Delivery Note
fields.description: Outbound anchor — always present (DN is required for §10 by construction). Single-key strategy per packet decision: orderNumber on the EE STN payload = DN name; idempotency hinge on re-push.

fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Mapped
SI-Pending
SI-Submitted
EE-Pushed
Partial-Received
Fully-Received
DN-Submitted-Locked
Drift
Disabled
fields.description: §10 transfer lifecycle. Mapped = row created on DN submit, pre-EE-push. SI-Pending = different-GSTIN, SI auto-drafted, awaiting ERP user submit. SI-Submitted = different-GSTIN, SI submitted (IPR auto-submit gate now clear). EE-Pushed = STN/PO sent to EE. Partial-Received = some IPRs landed, draft DN shrunk. Fully-Received = cumulative received >= dispatched. DN-Submitted-Locked = ERP user accepted loss; late-GRN handling now in manual-reconciliation mode. Drift = unexpected EE-side state or config gap. Disabled = FDE muted (e.g. cancelled transfer).

fields.label: Sales Invoice
fields.description: Populated only when GSTINs differ — Stage 2 auto-drafts the Internal SI sized to dispatched qty. Null in same-GSTIN flows (DN alone handles outbound).

fields.label: Source Warehouse
fields.description: Where stock leaves on DN submit. Together with target_warehouse determines EE-side routing: source EE-mapped → STN; source not EE-mapped, target EE-mapped → PO; both non-EE → Gate-0 inert (no Map row created).

fields.label: Target Warehouse
fields.description: Where stock lands on IPR submit. Stock parks in destination Company's GIT in transit (DN's standard posting); GIT → target_warehouse on IPR submit, only for received_qty.

fields.label: Source Company GSTIN
fields.description: Computed in validate from source_warehouse → Company → gstin. Single-level fetch_from doesn't span two Link hops (Warehouse → Company → gstin), so the controller fills this. Compared with target_company_gstin to derive gstin_different.

fields.label: Target Company GSTIN
fields.description: Computed in validate from target_warehouse → Company → gstin.

fields.label: GSTINs Differ
fields.description: Derived in validate: source_company_gstin != target_company_gstin. Drives the full SI/IPI/DN machinery (Schedule I supply event) vs. pure stock-movement (no SI) routing.

fields.label: EE DocType
fields.description: Determined by source/target EE-mapping at push time. STN = both EE-mapped. PO = source NOT mapped, target mapped (wholesale-in via Internal Supplier). B2B = source mapped, target NOT mapped (wholesale-out via Internal Customer). Empty pre-EE-push.

fields.label: EE OrderID (STN)
fields.description: Per §10.G, captured from createOrder response. PRIMARY status-channel key (analogous to §9's po_id on updatePoStatus). Stored as Data because EE returns all three order ids as strings.

fields.label: EE SuborderID (STN line)
fields.description: Line-level EE id from createOrder response. Used for downstream fulfillment cross-refs.

fields.label: EE InvoiceID (STN)
fields.description: EE-side invoice id from createOrder response. Used for downstream fulfillment cross-refs.

fields.label: EE po_id (PO path)
fields.description: Used only when ee_doctype='PO' (PO path reuses §9 CreatePurchaseOrder which returns data.poId as int). Stage 2 decides PO-path keying. Null on STN-path transfers.

fields.label: EE Push Pending (paused)
fields.description: §10 Stage 2 pause-defer flag. Set to 1 when DN.on_submit fires while auto_push_pos_on_save=0 (paused): Transfer Map + SI draft still land (ERPNext-side state), but the EE create-order call is deferred. fire_pending_transfer_pushes() picks up rows with this flag set after un-pause and fires the push. Binary (not a status target like §9's ecs_pending_po_status_push) because §10 outbound is a single createOrder call, not a multi-state status channel.

fields.label: Internal Purchase Invoice
fields.description: Auto-drafted in Stage 3 (different-GSTIN only) after first IPR submit. Sized to dispatched qty (mirrors submitted SI) for full ITC claim on GSTR-2B.

fields.label: Draft Debit Note
fields.description: Auto-drafted in Stage 3 (different-GSTIN AND received < dispatched). Sized to the gap; tax breakdown mirrors IPI. ERPNext Debit Note is a Purchase Invoice with is_return=1.

fields.label: GIT Balance (reported)
fields.description: Reported value — cumulative dispatched minus cumulative received across all linked IPRs. NOT the stock-ledger position (the real GIT balance lives in the destination Company's in-transit Warehouse). For variance / aged-GIT detection only.

fields.label: Linked IPRs
fields.description: Multi-GRN partial receipts produce multiple IPRs against the same DN/SI. Stage 3 appends rows here as each GRN arrives.

fields.label: Flag Reason
fields.description: Populated when status = Drift / Disabled, or when a transfer is in a non-pushable state. Carries the operator-facing explanation.

fields.label: Last Observed At
fields.description: Last time the integration refreshed this row from EE (Stage 3 GRN pull, Stage 2 STN-status reconciliation, etc.).

fields.label: Drift Fields
fields.description: Field-level drift findings — reuses §8f's shared Drift Field child DocType. Populated by §10 drift detection when EE-observed state diverges from ERPNext-pushed state.

fields.label: Excluded Fields
fields.description: Fields the FDE has explicitly opted out of drift detection — reuses §8f's shared Exclude Field child DocType.
